metadata.description: Official skill library for TUB students. AI-powered tools for business builders in A2A, SuperHuman, and UCL programs.

plugins.name: idea-validator
plugins.description: Pressure-test a digital product idea before building it. Scores across 5 dimensions and delivers a BUILD, RESHAPE, or SHELF verdict.

plugins.name: tub-skill-creator
plugins.description: Build custom Claude skills for your business. Create, test, improve, and ship reusable skills that solve real problems.
